task_completion.description: Verify that the required experimental Chrome flags are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the chrome://flags page with 'Experimental Web Platform features', 'Parallel downloading', and 'Experimental QUIC protocol' set to Enabled, and 'Smooth Scrolling' and 'Auto Dark Mode for Web Contents' set to Disabled.

task_completion.description: Verify that the custom search engines are added with the correct shortcuts and domains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome's 'Manage search engines and site search' settings page showing new entries with shortcuts 'mdn', 'npm', 'gh', and 'can' pointing to their respective domains.

task_completion.description: Verify that the startup pages are configured to open the specific required URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome's 'On startup' settings page with 'Open a specific page or set of pages' selected, listing github.com/dashboard, developer.chrome.com, and web.dev.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Chrome font sizes are customized according to the specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome's 'Customize fonts' settings page showing the Default font size set to 18, Fixed-width font size set to 15, and Minimum font size set to 12.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Chrome download directory is set to the required path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Chrome's 'Downloads' settings page showing the Location explicitly set to '/home/ga/projects/test-artifacts'.

task_completion.description: Verify that privacy and credential settings were accessed and modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Chrome's Privacy and Security settings or Password/Autofill settings being actively modified (e.g., toggling off 'Offer to save passwords' or adjusting cookie settings).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Chrome browser GUI to make changes rather than just editing a JSON preferences file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Chrome browser interface (chrome://settings and chrome://flags) being navigated and interacted with.

integrity.description: Ensure the settings pages are genuine Chrome internal pages and not mocked or spoofed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The address bar should clearly show 'chrome://settings/...' or 'chrome://flags' with the standard Chrome UI layout.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually opened or read the specification file to get the instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent opening '~/Desktop/perf_testing_standard.txt' in a text editor or using a terminal command (like cat) to read its contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Chrome Flags: Enabled (Experimental Web Platform features, Parallel downloading, Experimental QUIC protocol), Disabled (Smooth Scrolling, Auto Dark Mode for Web Contents). Expected Search Engines: mdn (developer.mozilla.org), npm (npmjs.com), gh (github.com), can (caniuse.com). Expected Font Sizes: Default 18, Fixed-width 15, Minimum 12. Expected Startup URLs: github.com/dashboard, developer.chrome.com, web.dev. Expected Download Directory: /home/ga/projects/test-artifacts.
